user.title: Connect to OvenMediaEngine
user.description: Enter the base URL of the OME REST API (e.g. https://restreamer.example.com/api or http://192.168.1.10:8081) and the access token (the AccessToken value from Server.xml). Without a scheme, http:// is assumed.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate OvenMediaEngine
reauth_confirm.description: The access token was rejected. Enter the current credentials.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the server. Check the base URL points at the OME REST API.
